title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Great British Energy by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to DESNZ regarding the proposed subsidy to GBE.  The report sets out the SAU’s evaluation of DESNZ’s Assessment of Compliance of the proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to Great British Energy by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero case page. "
